identity.name: Wil
identity.headline: Prepress operator at RRD, self-taught in Python and SQL, building working analytics tools while I finish an MS in IT Management and aim for a systems analyst role.

current_role.title: Prepress Operator
responsibilities: I handle prepress work for the print floor, getting jobs ready to run.

On my own initiative I started building analytics tools around the plant's operations. My manager and the company president both got behind that work and wrote recommendation letters for my graduate program.

career_target: Fidelity Investments LEAP Program, Systems Analyst track

projects.name: FloorPlan
projects.one_liner: A Python and Streamlit tool for scheduling the RRD press floor, built from operator interviews.
details: It's built as a clean Python package, with the data models, file parsing, configuration, and scheduling math each in their own module.
I gathered the requirements straight from the operators who run the floor, so it solves a problem I watched them deal with in person.
Like my other projects, I built it with AI assistance and then worked back through the code to understand how each part functions.

projects.name: Ask Wil
projects.one_liner: This chatbot; it answers only from my verified background and refuses everything else.
details: I built it so it can only answer from a fixed set of verified facts about me, and it refuses anything outside that set instead of guessing.
There is an automated test that throws adversarial recruiter questions at it to confirm it will not overclaim before it goes live.

I built it with heavy AI assistance and then went back through it to understand how each part works. That is on purpose. I want to use every tool available to me to see what is possible, then take it apart so I actually understand it.

work_history.title: Financial Customer Associate
highlights: Provided financial customer service to Fidelity clients.
Left voluntarily and on good terms, and I remain eligible for rehire.

work_history.title: Implementation Specialist
highlights: Spent just over three years implementing software systems for clients.

work_history.title: General Manager
highlights: Ran a small five-person operation with full profit and loss responsibility.

work_history.title: Bar Manager
highlights: Managed staffing and daily operations for a venue that held over a hundred guests.

sensitive_topics.salary_expectations: I'd rather discuss compensation once there's mutual interest in a specific role.
sensitive_topics.why_left_fidelity: I was early in my career and took the role without really knowing what I wanted from it. It was mostly inbound phone work, and I figured out fairly quickly that it wasn't the right fit for me at the time. I left on good terms and I'm still eligible for rehire, and now that I know the kind of work I want to do, Fidelity is exactly where I'm aiming.
